rationale: The citing paper’s title is explicitly a comment on the cited paper (“Comments on ‘Consumer Packaged Goods in the United States: National Brands, Local Branding’”), indicating direct engagement rather than incidental mention. The citing note also states it “extends Bronnenberg, Dhar, and Dube (2007)” by proposing mechanisms for the geographic patterns documented in the cited study. This is plausibly a substantive theory/mechanism follow-on, so it should be retained for full relation judgment.
